subtitle: Martial Arts Management
title: BlackBelt - Martial Arts Academy Management
short_description: Manage your martial arts academy: students, belt progressions, check-ins, classes and more.
description:
BlackBelt is the complete operating system for martial arts academies. Manage students, track belt progressions, register attendance with QR Code, organize classes and much more.

Key features:

- QR Code or biometric check-in
- Belt progression and grading tracking
- Class and schedule management
- Dashboards for instructors and administrators
- Real-time push notifications
- Works offline - syncs automatically
- Gamification with achievements and rankings
- AI-powered pedagogical insights
- Support for multiple martial arts (BJJ, Judo, Karate, Muay Thai and more)

For academies:
- Full control of enrollments and payments
- Attendance and progression reports
- Direct communication with students and parents
- Customization with academy colors and logo

For students:
- Track your progress and training history
- Receive notifications about classes and events
- View your achievements and belt grades
- Offline mode for check-in without internet

BlackBelt - Technology in service of martial arts.
keywords: martial arts, academy, management, bjj, jiu jitsu, judo, karate, muay thai, check-in, belt, grading, training, student, instructor
